cases.description: number_times=0 returns an empty string, not an error
cases.expected_note: Microsoft docs: "If number_times is 0 (zero), REPT returns \"\" (empty text)." Source: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/rept-function-04c4d778-e712-43b4-9c15-d656582bb061
Documented behavior: REPT does not accept negative number_times and returns #VALUE! (per Microsoft's REPT reference and its documented remarks on the number_times argument)

cases.description: A non-integer number_times is truncated toward zero before repeating
cases.expected_note: Documented: "If number_times is not an integer, it is truncated."
